title: rubus ebneri var. pilosior
intro: Rubus ebneri var. pilosior, also known as the Pilosior Blackberry, is a variant of the Blackberry plant, belonging to the Rosaceae family. It is a shrub native to Eastern Europe and Western Asia, with medicinal properties attributed to its leaves and roots, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The plant is known for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, providing health benefits such as wound healing, reducing fever, and alleviating digestive problems. Rubus ebneri var. pilosior can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine.
